title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
pattern: Tree â€” Preorder Traversal with Null Markers
coreIdea: Convert a binary tree to a string representation and back, preserving exact structure including null children. Preorder traversal with explicit null markers allows unambiguous reconstruction.
recognitionCues: asks to convert a tree to a string and back
reconstruction must exactly match original structure including nulls
approach: Serialize: preorder DFS, appending node value or a null marker (e.g., '#') to a list/string, joined by a delimiter. Deserialize: split the string, use an index/pointer that advances as you recursively rebuild - read a value, if null marker return None, else create node and recursively build left then right using the same pointer.
timeComplexity: O(n) for both serialize and deserialize
